title: Guardião do Espelho
overview: Thomas, a forensic scientist consumed by the darkness of his profession, sees his faith in God crumble. When he receives an eviction notice, he is forced to move his family to his great-grandfather's farm, where several crimes have already occurred. His daughter, Melissa, is possessed by a legion of demons, sparking a struggle between heaven and hell for her life.
